name: Elemental HERO Neos
description:
Your Duel Disk lights up: A new feature just dropped! Welcome to Duel Monsters Live! A way to get your monsters into our world to deepen the bond between players and their cards. Just ready up your duel disk and summon your monsters whenever and wherever you want. Play your traps and spells to change surroundings, and appearances of your Monsters.

You just downloaded the new update, ready to test out the new feature by summoning your Ace: Elemental HERO Neo
creator: Posaune
